nodes.label: Diarrhea Management Question
nodes.description: Decision point regarding the effectiveness of enhanced care versus usual care for children with acute diarrhea and risk factors.

question.text: In children up to 10 years of age with acute diarrhoea having risk factors (age, nutritional status, HIV status), what is the effectiveness of enhanced care (such as hospitalization, close clinical monitoring and/or longer follow-up after completion of treatment) compared to the usual care in improving clinical outcomes?

nodes.label: Clinical Outcomes
nodes.description: Improved clinical outcomes from the comparison of care strategies.
